> >Description:
> GRUB does not recognize Windows . Can't extract GAG to even figure it out; 
Ark freezes when trying.
> >How-To-Repeat:

Stock FreeBSD does not use GRUB as its boot loader.  Please ask the PC-BSD 
folks about this.

John Baldwin
